scoring._summary: Analyzed 135 scored results across 5 scenario(s) and 4 condition(s). Top condition: twining-lite (mean=77.2).

conditions._summary: 2/6 condition pairs significantly different after Holm-Bonferroni correction; 2/3 pairs vs 'baseline' are significant.

coordination.summary: Analyzed 892 sessions across 4 conditions. Overall engagement rate: 45% (402/892 sessions used Twining). Non-engagement flagged for: baseline, shared-markdown.

power_analysis.verdict: effect (d=0.70) is below detectable threshold (MDES=0.71) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.20) is below detectable threshold (MDES=0.69) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.65) is below detectable threshold (MDES=0.69) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect

at_5_iterations.note: Going from 3→5 iterations costs ~66% more but detects medium effects (d≈0.6) at 80% power

disordinal_interactions.interpretation: baseline and full-twining have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better
baseline and shared-markdown have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better
full-twining and shared-markdown have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better
full-twining and twining-lite have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better
shared-markdown and twining-lite have reversed rankings across scenarios — no single condition is universally better

harness_summary.headline: twining-lite ranks #1 with 77.2 composite (+10.8 vs baseline, medium effect, p<0.05)

items.message: Reduce tool surface area: full-twining (77.2) scores lower than twining-lite (77.2)
Broken scorer: dimension 'completion' has zero variance (always 93) — fix or remove
Coordination hurts in 'conflict-resolution': shared-markdown scores -7.0 points below baseline
Coordination hurts in 'context-recovery': shared-markdown scores -5.6 points below baseline
Scenario 'multi-session-build' x 'shared-markdown' has ceiling effect (mean=96.4, std=2.5) — consider redesigning for more discrimination
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'completion' has only 0.6-point spread across conditions
Interaction effect: baseline vs full-twining ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: baseline vs shared-markdown ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: full-twining vs shared-markdown ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: full-twining vs twining-lite ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner
Interaction effect: shared-markdown vs twining-lite ranking reverses across scenarios — no universal winner

High scorer variance (CV>20%) in 29 scenario x condition pairs for dimensions: architecturalDrift, assumptionHandling, backwardCompatibility, conflict-detection, context-accuracy, decision-documentation, decisionConsistency, decisionEvolution, finalQuality, integrationCompleteness, redundant-rework, requirementAdaptation, resolution-quality
Inconclusive comparisons (full-twining, shared-markdown, twining-lite): observed effects are below detectable threshold — cannot distinguish from noise at current sample size
Escalating cost in 'conflict-resolution' x 'full-twining': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.127)
Escalating cost in 'conflict-resolution' x 'twining-lite': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.226)
Escalating cost in 'evolving-requirements' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.214)
Escalating cost in 'evolving-requirements' x 'full-twining': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.167)
Escalating cost in 'multi-session-build' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.104)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.039)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'shared-markdown': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.028)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'twining-lite': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.035)
